messages.author: swarm
messages.text: BL-483 needs your approval before it can proceed. Reply here with "approve BL-483" (or "reject BL-483 <reason>") to act.

messages.author: swarm
messages.text:
What it is: Multi-option agent questions surface on Telegram with tappable answer capture: an ask that carries enumerated options renders them as buttons (or a poll), and the tap routes back as the answer
What it solves: THE GAP. The swarm already has a human-in-the-loop ask/answer loop (BL-306 ask+await, BL-325 loop,
BL-358 untagged-gate routing to the standing topics) and the front desk already round-trips inline
buttons (BL-410: reply_markup.inline_keyboard out, callback_query back, decideCallbackQueryAction
dis…
How it works: An ask carrying enumerated options posts to Telegram with one tappable button per option

messages.author: swarm
messages.text: BL-483 - Multi-option agent questions surface on Telegram with tappable answer capture: an ask that carries enumerated options renders them as buttons (or a poll), and the tap routes back as the answer is complete.
